summary: Iteration 65: Verified complete basketball removal from ReversePicks app. All 15 pytest tests passed. Frontend UI shows only Soccer (no basketball toggle in header, no NBA/basketball references in scan tab, no basketball sport toggles in Intel/Profile tabs, no NBA labels in Tracking tab). Backend has no basketball routes, utils, or settlement code. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: ProfileTab.jsx line 304 still has NBA/WNBA in LEAGUE_NAMES lookup table - this is just a display mapping for league IDs and doesn't affect functionality, but could be cleaned up for consistency

Old test files in /app/backend/tests/ still reference basketball (test_iteration_40_opponent_disambiguation.py, test_proptype_normalization.py) - these tests will fail if run since basketball files no longer exist

success_rate.frontend: 100% (app loads, no console errors, all basketball UI removed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 65 verified complete basketball removal. The app is now 100% soccer-only. Key verifications: (1) Header shows only 'Soccer' label with soccer ball icon - no basketball toggle, (2) Scan tab says 'Upload a soccer prop screenshot' - no NBA/basketball reference, (3) No basketball_predict.py or basketball_utils.py files exist, (4) api.js has no basketballSearchTeams/basketballPredict exports, (5) constants.js has no BASKETBALL_PROP_TYPES, (6) IntelTab/ProfileTab have soccer-only sport toggles, (7) TrackingTab has no NBA labels, (8) picks.py has no BBALL_STAT_MAP or basketball settlement, (9) scan.py has no basketball prompts, (10) grok_engine.py has no basketball settlement. Note: Intel tab button not visible in bottom nav (may have been removed or renamed to something else). Old basketball test files still exist but will fail if run.
